title: The Bible in Context
subtitle: The real world behind the sacred text
author: Wordsus Team
description: A fascinating journey through the ancient world to understand the historical, cultural and geographical context of the Scriptures. Discover how biblical characters lived, thought and felt to transform your reading of the Bible.

chapters.title: First Century Weddings: Awaiting the Promised Bridegroom
chapters.description: Discover the ancient stages of Jewish betrothal and marriage. This highly fascinating cultural context reveals the deep secrets of the ten virgins.

chapters.title: Welcoming the Stranger: The Sacred Duty of Hospitality
chapters.description: We explore hospitality in the ancient Middle East. Discover why washing feet and receiving strangers was a matter of sacred and true biblical honor.

chapters.title: The Shepherd and His Flock: Caring for the Ancient Sheep
chapters.description: Dive deep into the life of ancient shepherding and discover how the literal care of the sheep profoundly illuminates Psalm twenty-three and John ten.

chapters.title: Harvest Times: The Seasons and Ancient Biblical Farming
chapters.description: We analyze the ancient biblical agricultural cycle. The early and latter rains teach us highly valuable lessons about faith and God's judgment today.

chapters.title: Tears and Tombs: The Ancient Funeral Rites of the Bible
chapters.description: Learn about ancient mourning customs in Israel. The unique role of professional mourners and whitewashed tombs clarify difficult and intense texts.

chapters.title: Roofs and Stairs: The Architecture of the Israelite Home
chapters.description: Discover how the unique architecture and design of ancient Israelite homes explain the amazing miracle of the paralytic lowered through the flat roof.

chapters.title: The Bread and the Oil: Daily Food and Diet in the Bible
chapters.description: Explore everyday biblical meals and the profoundly deep spiritual meaning of sharing bread, drinking wine, and sitting together at the master's table.

chapters.title: Tunics and Cloaks: The Meaning Behind Biblical Clothing
chapters.description: We analyze biblical clothing, fringes, and phylacteries. You will fully understand the powerful meaning of touching the sacred hem of Jesus' garment.

chapters.title: At the Master's Feet: The Jewish Educational System Then
chapters.description: Delve into the Jewish educational system of the first century and the intense calling of disciples to literally imitate their beloved rabbi teacher.

chapters.title: Courageous Women: Their True Role in Ancient Bible Times
chapters.description: Understand the complex role of women in Jewish antiquity and how Jesus' compassionate and loving treatment radically broke ancient social paradigms.

chapters.title: Touching the Untouchable: Illness and Ritual Purification
chapters.description: Discover the intense religious stigma of leprosy in antiquity. This harsh historical context reveals what it meant when Jesus touched the untouchable.

chapters.title: The Kinsman Redeemer: Ruth, Boaz, and Ancient Israel Law
chapters.description: We explain the ancient levirate law and the kinsman redeemer. The beautiful story of Ruth and Boaz masterfully foreshadows Christ's great redemption.

chapters.title: Denarii and Talents: The First Century Economic System Now
chapters.description: Analyze ancient coins and Israel's economy. Knowing the real value of biblical talents will perfectly help you measure the huge debts in parables.

chapters.title: Troubled Waters: The Sea of Galilee and Its Fierce Storms
chapters.description: We explore the Sea of Galilee's geography. Its strange topography clearly explains why those sudden and incredibly violent storms occurred so often.

chapters.title: Broken Borders: The Ancient Enmity Between Judea, Samaria
chapters.description: Discover the true historical reasons why ancient Jews completely avoided Samaria, making the famous story of the Good Samaritan truly revolutionary.

chapters.title: The Meeting Place: The Desert as a Trial and Purification
chapters.description: We dive deep into the desert concept. More than a dry wasteland, it was a divine stage for testing, purification, and an intimate encounter with God.

chapters.title: Valleys of Judgment: Jerusalem, Kidron, and Hinnom Valley
chapters.description: We tour the historic valleys of Jerusalem. Learn exactly how the dark Hinnom Valley was vividly used as a literal and earthly illustration of hell.

chapters.title: A Sacred Mountain: The Incredible Story of Mount Moriah
chapters.description: Relive the extensive history of the Temple Mount. From the epic sacrifice of Isaac to the glorious construction of Solomon's and Herod's great temple.

chapters.title: The Dew of Hermon: Climate, Rains, and Heavenly Reliance
chapters.description: Discover how Israel's climate and seasonal rains functioned as a clear spiritual thermometer of their intimate relationship and total obedience to God.

chapters.title: Treasures in Qumran: The Dead Sea Scrolls Great Discovery
chapters.description: We analyze the major archaeological discovery in Qumran. These highly valuable scrolls definitively proved the perfect transmission of the biblical text.

chapters.title: Healing Waters: The Ancient Pools of Siloam and Bethesda
chapters.description: We explore modern discoveries of Siloam and Bethesda. Surprising current archaeology has wonderfully confirmed the precise accounts of John's gospel.

chapters.title: Fire on the Heights: Elijah and the Epic Carmel Mountain
chapters.description: Learn the fascinating geography of Mount Carmel. This crucial context highlights the truly epic confrontation between prophet Elijah and false prophets.

chapters.title: Asylum in Antiquity: The Purpose of the Six Refuge Cities
chapters.description: We carefully study the ancient cities of refuge in Israel. Discover exactly how this particular legal system of asylum operated for an involuntary killer.

chapters.title: Operations Center: Capernaum and the Ministry of Jesus
chapters.description: Tour the bustling fishing town of Capernaum. This highly important center housed numerous synagogues and served as the great headquarters of Jesus.

chapters.title: Paths of Stone: The Roman Roads and the Gospel Expansion
chapters.description: We analyze the extensive and solid network of Roman roads. You will learn how this great engineering facilitated the fast gospel expansion in Acts.

chapters.title: Routes of Danger: The Perilous Paths to Jericho and Emmaus
chapters.description: Explore the challenging geography of the road to Emmaus and Jericho. These dangerous and remote mountain routes were sadly famous for armed robbers.

chapters.title: The Great Silence: The Four Hundred Intertestamental Years
chapters.description: We dive into the Intertestamental period. During these highly important years of apparent prophetic silence, the entire biblical world scenery changed.

chapters.title: Rebellion and Miracles: The Maccabees and Hanukkah Origin
chapters.description: Learn about the bloody historical rebellion of the Maccabees. This key event explains Hanukkah's origin and the deep Jewish yearning for military freedom.

chapters.title: The Iron Empire: The Pax Romana and the Fulfilled Times
chapters.description: Study the vast influence of the Roman Empire. The great imposed peace, common language, and highly safe roads perfectly set the stage for Jesus Christ.

chapters.title: Builder and Tyrant: The Dark Paranoia of Herod the Great
chapters.description: Understand the deeply complex historical duality of Herod the Great. His immense architectural genius sadly contrasts with his most ruthless crimes.

chapters.title: Tradition vs. Power: The Pharisees Against the Sadducees
chapters.description: Compare the notable theological differences between Pharisees and Sadducees. Understand their ancient intense disputes to control the sacred temple.

chapters.title: Swords and Mysticism: The Zealots and the Essene Sect Now
chapters.description: We analyze the fringe movements of ancient Israel. Learn exactly who the armed zealots and the isolated, enigmatic mystics in the desert really were.

chapters.title: The Supreme Court: The Great Sanhedrin and Trial of Jesus
chapters.description: Explore the detailed functioning of the ancient Jewish Sanhedrin. Meet this council of seventy-one elders and all the strict laws they broke with Jesus.

chapters.title: Blood on the Altar: The Ancient Levitical Sacrifice System
chapters.description: Discover the different sacrifices in the Levitical system. Peace offerings, burnt offerings, and atonement illustrate how Christ perfectly fulfilled them.

chapters.title: Heavenly Shadows: The Amazing Design of the Tabernacle
chapters.description: Delve into the wonderful, rich symbolism of the ancient Tabernacle. Its sacred enclosures and holy furniture point directly to the glorious work of Christ.

chapters.title: Prophetic Calendar: The Seven Feasts of the Lord in Israel
chapters.description: Study the detailed prophetic calendar of ancient Israel. These seven solemn annual feasts beautifully reveal the precise and immense redemptive plan of God.

chapters.title: Fire and Destruction: The Fall of Jerusalem in Year Seventy
chapters.description: We analyze the prophesied and deeply tragic destruction of Jerusalem. This painful event in the year seventy drastically transformed the religious world.

chapters.title: Money and Betrayal: The Corrupt Roman Tax Collectors Then
chapters.description: Understand the intense social hatred directed toward the despised publicans. Learn why collecting ancient Roman taxes made them national traitors.

chapters.title: Beasts and Metals: The Empires Within the Visions of Daniel
chapters.description: Discover the prophetic sequence of mighty empires in Daniel. Understanding Babylon, Persia, Greece, and Rome profoundly shapes our view of eschatology.

chapters.title: Ancient Words: The Original Languages of the Holy Scripture
chapters.description: We deeply explore the ancient original biblical languages. Discover the beautiful nuances of Hebrew, Aramaic portions, and the massive accuracy of Koine Greek.

chapters.title: Rhymes of Thought: Hebrew Poetry and Its Many Parallelisms
chapters.description: Learn to read truly beautiful Hebrew poetry. Discover how wise biblical authors brilliantly rhymed amazing ideas instead of sounds to worship the Creator.

chapters.title: The Divine Seal: The Historical Process of Canonization
chapters.description: We carefully study the long historical process of the biblical canon. Learn exactly how the early church recognized which sacred books held divine authority.

chapters.title: Treaties of Vassals: The Ancient Middle Eastern Covenants
chapters.description: We analyze the highly important format of ancient Eastern treaties. The specific structure of these sovereign pacts is clearly reflected in the Sinai law.

chapters.title: Deceptive Idols: The False Canaanite Gods and Their Danger
chapters.description: Discover exactly who the terrible and dark gods of Canaan were. Learn why the fertility cult of Baal and Asherah was a constant, dangerous temptation.

chapters.title: The Price of Life: The Concept of Blood Inside the Bible
chapters.description: We delve deep into the vital and spiritual meaning of blood. Learn why the ancient remission of terrible sins always required this immensely huge sacrifice.

chapters.title: Identity and Promise: The Deep Meaning of Biblical Names
chapters.description: We explore the vital importance of ancient Hebrew names. In that biblical culture, a given name completely defined a person's character and true identity.

chapters.title: Ancient Greek Texts: The History of the Septuagint Bible
chapters.description: Learn the fascinating history of the highly sacred Septuagint. This early Greek translation was the exact biblical version our Lord Jesus Christ used to cite.

chapters.title: Sacred Codes: The Amazing Use of Ancient Bible Numerology
chapters.description: We analyze profound and sacred biblical numerology. Discover the real meaning of numbers, like the perfect seven and the number twelve for divine government.

chapters.title: Light Against Dark: Angels and Demons in the First Century
chapters.description: Delve into the intense spiritual worldview of the first century. This vital historical context beautifully clarifies the constant exorcisms in the gospels.

chapters.title: The Suffering King: Expectations About the Promised Messiah
chapters.description: We explore the historical concept of the longed-for Jewish Messiah. Understand Israel's deep frustration upon receiving a glorious king willing to suffer.

chapters.title: Reading Rules: How to Interpret the Different Bible Genres
chapters.description: Learn deeply about the beautiful and diverse biblical literary genres. Discover how to correctly interpret great prophecy, deep poetry, and historical facts.

chapters.title: Surprising Tales: The Wit of Ancient Rabbinical Parables
chapters.description: We study the powerful use of ancient rabbinical parables. Understand why Jesus masterfully took this common method of Jewish teaching toward total perfection.
